positive: A whimsical and highly stylized illustration of a cosmic forest scene. Focus on bioluminescent flora and fauna, suggesting a blend of mystic nature and deep space. The composition should be symmetrical, featuring giant, stylized mushrooms glowing in electric teal and magenta, entangled with vines that house small, ethereal star-like creatures. Two central elements: a floating crescent moon and a geometrically perfect nebula structure in the background. The overall style must be clean, high-contrast vector art inspired by Art Nouveau and modern scientific illustration. Use strong, defined outlines and flat blocks of color with gradient accents for glow. Central subject must fill the frame beautifully for a T-shirt print. Dynamic composition, volumetric lighting, deep indigo and cosmic teal palette.
negative: blurry, low resolution, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, artifacts, sketch, messy, grainy, muted colors, grayscale
